hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(fp)" | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.html|*.css|*.js) npx prettier --write "$f" 2>/dev/null; echo "[prettier] formatted $f" ;; esac } || true

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); fp=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(fp)" | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.js) node --check "$f" 2>&1 && echo '[verify] OK' || echo '[verify] FAILED' ;; esac } || true

python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); c=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(c)" | { read -r cmd; case "$cmd" in *'git commit'*|*'git commit '*|*'git commit --'*) echo '{}' | python -c "import sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin)" 2>/dev/null; npx prettier --check "**/*.{html,css,js}" 2>/dev/null || { echo '{\"systemMessage\":\"请先格式化代码再提交: npx prettier --write .\",\"continue\":false}'; exit 0; } ;; esac } || true
